summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VMS360 Zone Masking Feature. Backend API tests (13/13 passed) and Frontend UI tests (all features verified). Zone CRUD operations work correctly, heatmap API returns zones data, and frontend zone masking toggles function as expected.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - minor issue, charts still render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/floors/{floor_id}/zones - Returns zones array with correct structure
Backend: POST /api/floors/{floor_id}/zones - Creates new zone successfully
Backend: PUT /api/floors/{floor_id}/zones/{zone_id} - Updates zone properties
Backend: DELETE /api/floors/{floor_id}/zones/{zone_id} - Deletes zone successfully
Backend: DELETE non-existent zone returns 404
Backend: GET /api/heatmap/live/{floor_id} - Returns zones array for masking
Backend: GET /api/heatmap/range/{floor_id} - Returns zones array for masking
Backend: Zones have show_heatmap flag for masking control
Backend: GET /api/floors/{floor_id} includes zones array
Backend: PUT /api/floors/{floor_id} can update zones array
Backend: Zone creation with different types (corridor, plaza, entrance, shop, restricted, general)
Backend: Zone creation with show_heatmap=false
Backend: GET zones for non-existent floor returns 404
Frontend: Heatmap page loads correctly with store/floor selection
Frontend: Zones are visible on heatmap canvas with dashed borders and labels
Frontend: Görselleştirme Ayarları (Visualization Settings) panel expands correctly
Frontend: Bölge Maskeleme (Zone Masking) section visible when zones exist
Frontend: Bölge Sınırları (Zone Borders) toggle works - shows/hides zone outlines
Frontend: Bölge Maskesi (Zone Mask) toggle works - enables/disables zone masking
Frontend: Helper text explains zone masking functionality
critical_code_review_comments: Zone masking implementation uses ray casting algorithm (isPointInZone function) - correct approach for polygon containment
Zones with show_heatmap=false are correctly excluded from heatmap rendering
Backend properly returns zones array in both /api/heatmap/live and /api/heatmap/range endpoints
Frontend correctly shows zone masking controls only when zones exist (conditional rendering)
seed_data_creation: Test floor (c713f669-075f-4e06-b252-9b5fd57ac1eb) has 5 pre-existing zones: Ana Koridor, Giriş Alanı, Çıkış Alanı, and 2 additional zones
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zone masking feature fully tested. Backend Zone CRUD endpoints work correctly (POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/floors/{floor_id}/zones). Heatmap API returns zones array. Frontend has Bölge Maskeleme section in settings with two toggles: Bölge Sınırları (zone borders) and Bölge Maskesi (zone mask). Test floor ID: c713f669-075f-4e06-b252-9b5fd57ac1eb

frontend_zone_masking.settings_panel: Görselleştirme Ayarları expands to show zone controls
frontend_zone_masking.zone_borders_toggle: Bölge Sınırları toggle shows/hides zone outlines
frontend_zone_masking.zone_mask_toggle: Bölge Maskesi toggle enables/disables zone masking
frontend_zone_masking.zone_visualization: Zones displayed with dashed borders, semi-transparent fill, and labels
